articles.title: China will send giant pandas to Atlanta again
articles.summary: 📰 싱가포르 최신 뉴스\n📢 China will send giant pandas to Atlanta again...
articles.content: BEIJING (AP) — Atlanta will have giant pandas again. in Beijing's latest efforts of panda diplomacy despite tensions with Washington, less than a month before a much-anticipated visit by U.S. President Donald Trump to Beijing. Chinese experts provided technical guidance on the upgrades, it said
